holdings.infoBox: DIPS is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings.

overview.description: The YieldMax Short NVDA Option Income Strategy ETF (DIPS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide current income and inverse exposure to Nvidia stock (NVDA). The fund pursues its objective through an actively managed synthetic covered put strategy, using US Treasurys as collateral DIPS was launched on Jul 23, 2024 and is issued by YieldMax.
